# Timestamp Camera

> Timestamp Camera is a mobile app that stamps date and time on your photos automatically.

## About

Timestamp Camera helps users record daily moments with date and time proof. Available on iOS and Android with 4.8 stars from 140K+ reviews.

## Key Features

- Auto Timestamp: Automatically stamps date and time when you take a photo
- Album Import: Add timestamps to existing photos from your album
- Various Designs: Multiple stamp designs and colors to choose from
- Instant Save: Photos are saved immediately after capture

## Popular Use Cases

- Meal and diet logging
- Workout tracking
- Study session proof
- Wake-up time verification
- Baby growth records
- Work time documentation
- Travel journaling

## Links

- Website: https://timestamp.camera
- iOS App: https://apps.apple.com/app/id1115974495
- Android App: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.artifyapp.timestamp
- Online Tool: https://timestamp.camera/en/add-date-to-photo/
- Privacy Policy: https://timestamp.camera/privacy.html
- Terms of Service: https://timestamp.camera/terms.html
- Contact: contact@timestamp.camera

Artify Inc.
